'''âp-k-f-f''' ('''kapakfefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hlep|hlep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hlep|hlep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-k-f-f
|-
! Lemma
| kapakfefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipakfefoko|thipakfefoko]] || [[word:jipakfefoko|jipakfefoko]] || [[word:shipakfefoko|shipakfefoko]] || [[word:kipakfefoko|kipakfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupakfefoko|thuthupakfefoko]] || [[word:jujupakfefoko|jujupakfefoko]] || [[word:shushupakfefoko|shushupakfefoko]] || [[word:kukupakfefoko|kukupakfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupakfefoko|thupakfefoko]] || [[word:jupakfefoko|jupakfefoko]] || [[word:shupakfefoko|shupakfefoko]] || [[word:kupakfefoko|kupakfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupakfefoko|thupakfefoko]] || [[word:jupakfefoko|jupakfefoko]] || [[word:shupakfefoko|shupakfefoko]] || [[word:kupakfefoko|kupakfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepakfefoko|thepakfefoko]] || [[word:jepakfefoko|jepakfefoko]] || [[word:shepakfefoko|shepakfefoko]] || [[word:kepakfefoko|kepakfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopakfefoko|thothopakfefoko]] || [[word:jojopakfefoko|jojopakfefoko]] || [[word:shoshopakfefoko|shoshopakfefoko]] || [[word:kokopakfefoko|kokopakfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopakfefoko|thopakfefoko]] || [[word:jopakfefoko|jopakfefoko]] || [[word:shopakfefoko|shopakfefoko]] || [[word:kopakfefoko|kopakfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopakfefoko|thopakfefoko]] || [[word:jopakfefoko|jopakfefoko]] || [[word:shopakfefoko|shopakfefoko]] || [[word:kopakfefoko|kopakfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpakfefoko|thĂŠpakfefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpakfefoko|jĂŠpakfefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpakfefoko|shĂŠpakfefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpakfefoko|kĂŠpakfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapakfefoko|thathapakfefoko]] || [[word:jajapakfefoko|jajapakfefoko]] || [[word:shashapakfefoko|shashapakfefoko]] || [[word:kakapakfefoko|kakapakfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapakfefoko|thapakfefoko]] || [[word:japakfefoko|japakfefoko]] || [[word:shapakfefoko|shapakfefoko]] || [[word:kapakfefoko|kapakfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapakfefoko|thapakfefoko]] || [[word:japakfefoko|japakfefoko]] || [[word:shapakfefoko|shapakfefoko]] || [[word:kapakfefoko|kapakfefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapakfefithi|shapakfefithi]] || [[word:shapakfefiji|shapakfefiji]] || [[word:shapakfefishi|shapakfefishi]] || [[word:shapakfefiki|shapakfefiki]]
